title: nvm_available returns anonymous 4-tuple
description: nvm_available() returns (u32, u16, u32, u16) — an anonymous tuple. Call sites must destructure positionally and remember that index 0 is avail_size, index 1 is avail_objects, etc. ServerInfo and NvmMetadata already use named structs for the same reason. Suggested rewrite: introduce pub struct NvmAvailability { pub avail_size: u32, pub avail_objects: u16, pub reclaim_size: u32, pub reclaim_objects: u16 } and return that instead. No extra boilerplate — it is strictly more readable and consistent with the rest of the crate.
